appSubtitle: AI dataset intelligence with anomaly signals, forecasting, aur actionable insights.
analyzingDataset: Apka dataset analyze ho raha hai
loadingSummary: Premium insights, KPIs aur smart recommendations banne laag gaye.
heroTitle: Enterprise-grade analytics with clarity aur speed.
heroText: CSV upload karo, opportunities find karo, aur apni team ke saath insights share karo.
uploadCsvTitle: Shuru karne ke liye dataset upload karo
filePrompt: CSV, XLSX ya JSON file drag-drop karo ya browse karo.
dataHealthText: Visual quality score with missing, duplicate aur clean breakdown.
anomalySubtitle: Spikes aur drops AI se highlight hote hain
technicalSnapshotText: Deep data quality aur distribution metrics
uploadFirstDatasetText: Intelligent insights, quality analysis aur recommendations ke liye CSV submit karo.
noChartsFilter: Is filter ke liye koi charts nahi mila.
filterFallbackText: Ap explore karte reh sako is liye ye visualizations dikhaye jaa rahe hain.
noVisualizations: Is dataset ke liye abhi koi visualizations available nahi hain.
noVisualizationDataText: CSV upload karo aur charts explore karne wapas aao.
askSubtitle: Natural language se apne dataset ke baare mein pooch
askHint: Jaise questions pooch: 'Kaun sa product kharab perform kar raha hai?', 'Top category kya hai?' ya 'Duplicate rows dikhao.'
askAfterUpload: Upload ke baad apne data se pooch
askAfterUploadText: Questions enable karne ke liye dataset upload karo.
noHistory: Koi matching history records nahi mila.
reportReadyTitle: Report download ke liye ready hai
reportGeneratingText: Apka Data Mantri summary prepare ho raha hai.
reportReadyText: Is report ko PDF ke roop mein print ya save karne ke liye neeche button use karo.
footerText: Data Mantri - Smart dataset monitoring, anomaly alerts aur easy sharing AI teams ke liye.
initialStory: AI analyst summary pane ke liye dataset upload karo.
noDominantCategory: Abhi koi dominant category nahi mila.
forecastReady: Jab dataset mein time-based numeric trends honge, forecasting ready hoga.
statusAnalyzing: Dataset analyze ho raha hai - kripya wait karo...
uploadFailed: Upload fail ho gaya. Kripya dobara try karo.
questionFailed: Apka question process nahi ho saka. Kripya dobara try karo.
analystSignal: Ye analyst ke liye high-confidence data signal hai.
modeSummaryEli5: Simple language mein insights fast samjh aur easy decisions ke liye.
modeSummaryBusiness: Action-ready suggestions, impact metrics aur executive narrative ke saath.
modeSummaryData: Technical profiling, distribution patterns, correlation aur quality signals.
upgradeText: Apka free trial end ho gaya. Auto-cleaning, forecasting, anomaly detection, suggestions, unlimited chatbot, PDF reports aur advanced filters ke liye Premium upgrade karo.
businessAdvisorTooltip: Free AI-powered business insights, KPIs aur recommendations pao
preparingCleanedDownload: Clean CSV prepare ho rahi hai...
cleanDataFailed: Ye dataset clean nahi ho saka. Kripya dobara try karo.
cleaningPerfectNote: Clean data ab analysis ke liye ready hai, koi missing values baaki nahi hain.
chatbotLimitReached: Basic chatbot limit puri ho gaya. Unlimited questions ke liye Premium upgrade karo.
upgradeFailed: Apka plan upgrade nahi ho saka. Kripya dobara try karo.
voiceIdle: Mic tap karo aur Hinglish mein poochho
voiceAnalyzing: Aapke uploaded data ko analyze kar raha hai...
voiceTitle: Apne business data se baat karo
voiceSubtitle: Hinglish mein naturally poochho. Aapka CSV server par analyzed rehta hai.
voiceNoData: Pehle CSV upload aur analyze karo, phir advisor real data se answer dega.
voiceNoSupport: Voice input ke liye Chrome ya Edge chahiye. Aap Ask Your Data mein type bhi kar sakte ho.
voiceExampleRevenue: Kaunsa product maximum revenue generate karta hai?
voiceExampleProfit: Profit kam kyu ho raha hai?
auth_subtitle: Premium analytics built to answer aapke har dataset ke sawal.
auth_loginError: Request complete nahi ho paayi. Dobara try karo.
auth_signupSuccess: Account ban gaya. Ab login karo.
auth_otpSent: Email par bheja gaya OTP dalo.
auth_alreadyHaveAccount: Pehle se account hai? Login karo
auth_resetSuccess: Password reset successful. Ab login karo.
auth_passwordTooShort: Password mein kam se kam 8 characters hone chahiye.
auth_resetInstructions: Apne account ka email dalo. Hum secure reset link bhejenge.
auth_linkReady: Naya password banane ke liye email wala reset link kholo.

profilePhrases.Manage your account and subscription: Apna account aur subscription manage karo
profilePhrases.Keep your workspace settings, usage, and: Workspace settings, usage aur security controls ek clean Premium dashboard mein rakho.
profilePhrases.Set your dashboard for executive insight: Dashboard ko executive insights ke liye set karo.
Email alerts aur updates receive karo.
profilePhrases.Ask for help with uploads, analysis, bil: Uploads, analysis, billing ya account access ke liye help maango.
profilePhrases.Subject: Subject
Jo requests submit ki hain unhe track karo.
profilePhrases.Users, plans, uploads, and query usage s: Users, plans, uploads aur query usage app database mein stored hain.
Support request submit nahi ho saki.
